text: Stepping into this space, an intersection of science and creativity, I feel curiosity stirring. The glass walls create a transparent boundary, inviting yet separating me from what is within. The fire extinguisher by my side is a silent reminder of caution—yet I am driven to cross the threshold, compelled by the colors and cryptic symbols beyond. There is both anticipation and a sense of respectful distance; I am an observer on the verge of becoming a participant.
